svg.text: Based on Splunk Validated Architecture (SVA) · C1/C11 Single-Site Clustered Deployment · Splunk Enterprise 9.4.x
Controls the indexer cluster · Does NOT index or store data
Manages peer health · bucket replication · rolling restarts
Tells Search Heads which indexer peers to query
⚠ If CM goes down: indexing + search CONTINUE uninterrupted · Co-located with License Manager
Config management for the entire forwarder fleet
Server Classes → Deployment Apps · UFs phone home every 60 seconds
Manages FORWARDERS ONLY — NOT indexers or search heads
CLI: splunk reload deploy-server · Config: serverclass.conf · Co-located with Cluster Manager
Tracks daily uncompressed GB indexed across all indexers
Warns on daily limit breach · 5+ violations in 30 days → search blocked
Data is NEVER dropped on violation · Indexing always continues
License types: Enterprise · Dev/Test · Free · Trial · Co-located with Cluster Manager
Single pane of glass for deployment health
Indexing throughput · disk usage per indexer · search concurrency
Forwarder connectivity status · license usage · scheduler activity
Dedicated Splunk instance · Essential for SOC infrastructure health monitoring
Tiers: 🔵 Endpoints · 🟡 Collection · 🔴 Indexing · 🟢 Search · ⚫ Management Plane
Source: Splunk Validated Architectures (SVA) · C1/C11 Single-Site Clustered Deployment · docs.splunk.com/SVA · Splunk Enterprise 9.4.x
